name: Gated XSA + CaseOps + LQER g32/top4 + In-Timer N-gram Tilt
author: vaibhavmishra1

reference_logs.note: Reference run only; uses LQER_TOP_K=1, LQER_RANK=4, LQER_ASYM_GROUP=64, MATRIX_LR=0.026, PHASED_TTT_PREFIX_DOCS=1250. Not included in claimed mean.

lineage.primary_codebase: PR #2018 (simon-marcus): Gated XSA + token-only in-timer n-gram tilt + PR #1967/V21 lineage
lineage.quant_tuning: PR #2060 (S0urC10ud): portable LQER/GPTQ knobs, specifically rank=2, asym_group=32, top_k=4, MATRIX_LR=0.028
lineage.caseops: CaseOps SP8192 lossless-caps tokenizer and byte sidecar dataset lineage

credits.author: simon-marcus
credits.contribution: Primary codebase, Gated XSA, token-only in-timer n-gram tilt, PR #1967/V21 lineage

credits.author: S0urC10ud
credits.contribution: Portable LQER/GPTQ retune: rank=2, group=32, top_k=4, MATRIX_LR=0.028

credits.author: ndokutovich
credits.contribution: V21 + n-gram tilt + LeakyReLU base lineage

credits.author: codemath3000
credits.contribution: Per-group compression and strong SP8192 stack

credits.author: AnirudhRahul
credits.contribution: N-gram tilt with closed-form probability renormalization

all_included_logs_summary.note: Includes train_seed1234.log, which is numerically close but used earlier LQER top1/rank4/group64 and prefix1250 settings.
